description: §41.14.5 — pick=["name", "email"] names ONLY valid Signup fields. Near-miss sibling of formfor-pick-invalid-field: proves E-FORMFOR-PICK-INVALID-FIELD is gated on unknown field names specifically, not on the mere presence of pick=.
rationale: §41.14.5: pick=[...] SHALL accept an array literal of bare field-name strings that are all declared struct fields; a fully-valid pick list does NOT fire E-FORMFOR-PICK-INVALID-FIELD.
